questions.question: Explain the difference between Strict and Rigorous 2PL
keyPoints: Strict: Holds all locks until commit
Rigorous: All locks held till end, prevents cascading aborts

questions.question: Compare trade-offs between 2PL and MVCC in high-contention environments
keyPoints: 2PL: Better for write-heavy, higher deadlock risk
MVCC: Better for read-heavy, version storage overhead
